features: PROFESSIONAL: Mehron’s Paradise Makeup AQ is a world-renowned face & body paint that is trusted by makeup artists and performers worldwide for its rich and vibrant colors, ease of use, and long-lasting formula. True professional grade, trusted by Hollywood and Broadway pros since 1927.
WATER ACTIVATED: This water-activated formula can be customized to your desired consistency, making it ideal for creating a wide range of looks, from subtle accents to bold and dramatic designs.

MAGNETIC REFILLS: The metal refill pans also allow you to easily rearrange your favorite colors in our magnetic palette, making it the perfect solution for artists on the go or those who want to create a personalized palette that suits their specific needs

HOW TO USE: For best results, it is recommended to use a damp sponge or brush to activate the product, adding more or less water as needed to achieve the desired consistency. You can also use Mehron’s Barrier Spray before and after application to prevent staining and make the finished look last all day and night..

ABOUT MEHRON: For over 95 years, Mehron has been an industry-leading, professional makeup company with a passion for inspiring creativity. Mehron’s award-winning cosmetics and special FX products are used in most stage and film performances in Hollywood, on Broadway, and by artists across the globe. Mehron products are made in the USA & always cruelty-free.
description: Product description Mehron Makeup Paradise Makeup AQ Refills are an essential component of any professional or aspiring makeup artist's kit. These versatile and highly pigmented makeup refills are designed to be used with the Mehron Paradise Makeup AQ line, a renowned brand in the industry known for its exceptional quality and vast array of vibrant colors. Directions Application: Apply the product to the desired place and activate it with water. Let it dry. Remove: Wash with soap and water. Safety Warning Inhalation: Remove to fresh air. Get medical attention if breathing is difficult. Skin Contact: Non-hazardous. Wash exposed area of skin with soap and water. If skin irritation or allergic reaction occurs, get medical attention. Ingestion: If swallowed, drink copious amounts of water. Do not induce vomiting. Get prompt medical attention. See more
